aeo_readiness.summary: The business has minimal AEO readiness with a lack of essential optimizations and online presence management.
quick_wins: Implement basic on-page SEO by adding relevant keywords to title tags, meta descriptions, and header tags.
Create and optimize a Google Business Profile to improve local search visibility.
Encourage customers to leave reviews on Google and other relevant platforms to build credibility.

gbp_analysis.summary: No Google Business Profile (GBP) was found for the business, indicating a significant gap in local search optimization.
critical_issues: Lack of a GBP means the business is invisible in Google Maps and local search results.
Missing out on potential local customer engagement and lead generation.

nap_citations.summary: NAP (Name, Address, Phone number) citations are inconsistent or missing across the web, affecting local SEO.
action_items: Ensure consistent NAP information across all online directories and platforms.
List the business on major local directories such as Yelp, Yellow Pages, and industry-specific sites.
Monitor and update NAP information regularly to maintain accuracy.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and optimization for AI-driven search features.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Voice search, rich results, and AI-powered search features.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implement schema markup for LocalBusiness and Service to improve search engine understanding of the website content.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: By optimizing for AI search and enhancing online presence, the business can establish itself as a local authority in the HVAC industry.

page_title: Florida Air and Heat - Reliable HVAC Services
